channel.title: GitHub Trending - Aggiornati di recente in All Languages (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Aggiornati di recente) più popolari in All Languages nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x (468117 ⭐)

item.title: 📝 ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh (184930 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ohmyzsh

📝 Repository: ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh

📄 Descrizione: 🙃 A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

⭐ Stelle: 184930

🍴 Forks: 26292

💻 Linguaggio: Shell

🏷️ Topics: cli cli-app oh-my-zsh oh-my-zsh-plugin oh-my-zsh-theme ohmyzsh plugin-framework plugins productivity shell terminal theme themes zsh zsh-configuration
